title: Allegro MicroSystems Quarterly Earnings Preview
text: Allegro MicroSystems will announce quarterly earnings this Thursday morning, with market analysts watching closely for recovery signals. The company exceeded revenue expectations last quarter by 4.3% while experiencing a year-over-year decline of 19.9%, reaching $192.8 million. The quarter showed improved inventory management and earnings-per-share gains. Analysts anticipate a significant turnaround with projected revenue growth of 18.6% year-over-year to $197.9 million, a sharp contrast to the 40% decline from the same quarter last year. Adjusted EPS is expected to reach $0.08. Most analysts have recently reconfirmed their estimates, suggesting confidence in the company's trajectory. Within the broader processors and graphics chips sector, competitor performance has been mixed. Allegro's share price remained stable, with analysts setting a price target of $35.42 compared to its current trading price of $34.01.
